date: 2026-04-29

h1. INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md

----





h2. INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# InGit as Cowork-Native Workspace Substrate
